Truncheon of Doom  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 44
DMG: 33 Dmg Bonus: 152
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Tepid Deeds (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 50
WT: 10.0 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

This item is found on creatures.

Post Comment
Still drop???
QuoteReply
# Oct 28 2025 at 6:26 AM Rating: Decent
Denaddor
Scholar
23 posts
Got one on my warrior..... My chanter/shammy in a bag.... Still wondering where My Earthshaker went..... This lil cool tool still dropping on a rare basis or they finally gave it the boot...... I usually only pul it out on a named.... that 30 percent slow is NICE......
▲ Page top
Dropped on 1/5/13
QuoteReply
# Jan 07 2013 at 2:34 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595176692635
Scholar
53 posts
Went down here with my 76 Necro on Saturday night, 1/5/13.
I was mainly looking for Trakanon, but he wasn't up, so I went back to the beginning of the zone to mess around killing frogs and scarabs.

I really don't know the zone *too* well and even then, it's been about 10 yrs since I was here in any regular frequency.
I kept killing swarms of (mostly) frogs, eventually making my way down to the "chef" area (big room w/ long table).
I went up the stairs and killed a couple frogs on the balcony.
I then went back and around the corner and ran into a Froglok Armsman.

I wonder what he drops? I thought.

Killed him and looted "Truncheon of Doom".
Looking at posts, it seems like this is a very rare drop. I guess I just got lucky?

For the record, he was NOT wielding anything during the fight, so you will not know if he has it until you loot him.
▲ Page top
ToD
QuoteReply
# Feb 08 2011 at 7:25 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591984428975
5 posts
Still dropping in 2011. Been logging in a character I parked there and killing the room every so often. After a discouraging kill of a bunch of minis in PoHate, and Innoruuk, for an attempt at a SEoC for my Ranger so he can look better on Character Select, I popped over and there he was with the Truncheon to cheer me up.
▲ Page top
Resis?
QuoteReply
# Nov 24 2009 at 10:31 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593371240999
6 posts
Just got one on BB. Wondering how much it gets resisted on higher end mobs(80-85). Also, does it create good aggro just like a normal slow would?
▲ Page top
Resis?
QuoteReply
# Jan 03 2010 at 9:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593375200333
10 posts
Buddy and I are using this to slow in Underquarry. Working pretty well for us, not resisting too much at all.
▲ Page top
Re: Resis?
QuoteReply
# Nov 24 2009 at 5:08 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1691367413219
Guru
2,689 posts
Average high level mob, commonly resisted, but usually lands within 1-3 procs. Only extreme high magic resist mobs does it get resisted alot. Aggro for the proc is nice, but the dps of the weapon gives little aggro while waiting for the proc. I generally when in a group and using it to slow, first use 2 1HS snare weapons with DD+Stun augs to keep aggro until the snare procs, then immediately switch to the ToD hoping for a quick Slow proc. But even it takes a few secs, the use of an Aggro disc + the Snare proc, and of the DD+Stun procs usually give you some solid aggro long enough for the ToD to proc, unless it's being finicky :D

Definitely starting with ToD and waiting for it proc, even with Aggro discs, you'll often lose aggro before it procs. But most of the time in groups, I don't even use it, as it's not worth it, with group dps, unless it's a named mob with alot of hps and considerable dps on it's part.

BTW: As with all slows on higher level mobs, the vast majority is mitigated, but it still helps, and is especially helpful on mobs with haste buffs, even if mostly mitigated.

Just my experience, yours may vary.

Yther Ore.

Edited, Nov 24th 2009 6:12pm by Yther
▲ Page top
Still drops
QuoteReply
# Oct 23 2009 at 2:20 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591768863715
6 posts
Had this nice little weapon drop on 10-24-09 on Bertoxx. Took about a week of off and on camping. Saw the named twice before he dropped the Trunch. Previously dropped Mrylokar's Helm and the Seb Scale bracer.

Hope this helps.

Papichulo
85th Shammy of Bertoxx
▲ Page top
Still Works
QuoteReply
# May 29 2009 at 1:18 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591792065444
Sage
221 posts
I use this to slow mobs in Old Bloodfields (and other zones) and it still works great. I just can't believe I didn't know it existed before today. After I watched a group without a slower work their magic in this zone for a tank with under 4500 ac I had to ask. Found out he had one of these bad boys and that prevented him from being shredded up like paper. I literally RAN to the bazaar and happily paid the asking price. Considering how easy platinum is to come by, and how little I can actually spend on anything at my level because everything is no trade (leaving me with a LOT of unspent platinum), I probably would have paid 200,000.

Edited, May 29th 2009 5:21am by tripodvi
▲ Page top
Still Dropping!
QuoteReply
# Nov 16 2008 at 1:01 AM Rating: Decent
-REDACTED-
9 posts
The truncheon still drops off the armsman as of 11/15/08. Myself and a buddy with a couple of alts have looted three(3) of them in the past week. It is still the extremely rare drop for the little frog! We have just killed it way too many times to have kept count. Our warriors are extremely pleased!

Edited, Dec 28th 2008 7:35am by Crakn

This dropped for me a couple of hours ago on Test Server. Long camp for me, cleared the room about 50 times over 4 days. But, when all said and done, I had the Truncheon of Doom, and 4k plat in cash and gems....plus a bunch of spells. Trivial camp for a 70 war, bring a good book to read between spawns.

# Jul 05 2005 at 11:05 AM Rating: Decent

Dropped on Druzzil Ro on July 3rd, 2005. Make sure you're camping the Armsman and not the Armorer. (My mistake, camped the wrong guy for 8 hours.) After finding the correct room, he dropped the Truncheon on his 5th spawn. (about 4 hours total.)

On 7th Hammer these sell for about 20k. It's a nice enough hammer and my warrior use it to slow when she fights with her druid pet in PoP zones but once slow has landed it goes off for other weapons with more DPS. I paid 24k for it a while back and I don't consider that a particularly good deal. 10k would have been, though. =)

This dropped today for me in Sebilis. 20 hours of camping over 4 different session. I was drowning in Myrlokars Helms and the new Zerker helms, I did not think the Truncheon would ever drop. But it did. The camp site is right by the chef camp, upstairs and to the left as you face the last door into chef.
